title: Anoplanthus comosus
taxonomy: Anoplanthus comosus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant belongs to the genus Anoplanthus, which is part of the broader order Caryophyllales. Within the Caryophyllales order, Anoplanthus comosus is classified as a member of the family Phytolaccaceae, which is a group of plants commonly known as the "pokeberry" family. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and molecular characteristics.
